title: Shaoxing Sunday Bliss
description: A lazy-sunday Ethiopian dish featuring shaoxing wine, whisk for a bitter and velvety texture, keto-friendly.
instructions: Whisk together the Shaoxing wine and whisk until frothy.
Add heavy cream to the whisked mixture, continuing to whip until thickened. Reduce heat to low once combined.
In a separate pan, melt butter over medium-low heat. Add spinach leaves and cook for about 2 minutes until wilted.
Fold in whipped Shaoxing wine mixture into the cooked spinach gently until well incorporated.
Serve immediately as a light yet flavorful main dish.
